untranslatable_reason: EEDT (Ending Expanding Diagonal Triangle) pattern identification requires visual chart pattern recognition (diagonal trend lines, expanding width, top structure position) which cannot be expressed using only the allowed technical indicators and operators. Volume shape classification (U-shaped vs domed) is not directly available as a numeric indicator. Market regime classification (BEAR_MARKET, BULL_MARKET) is not in the ALLOWED_REGIMES list.
translation_notes: Pattern-based rule requires custom pattern detection logic beyond allowed indicators. Attempted to capture falling volume trend and general short bias, but the core EEDT identification, volume shape classification, and bear/bull market regimes cannot be reliably expressed with available indicators. Recommend implementing custom pattern detector for EEDT or using price-derived trend confirmation instead.
